type: flowchart
title: Signa Play - Plan MVP
direction TB

Start [shape: circle, label: Signa Play (MVP), color: #dbeafe, status: done]
Stack [label: Stack Expo - web + Android primero (iOS despues), status: done]
Monorepo [label: Scaffold monorepo (Expo Router + TS), status: done, file: signa-play/package.json; signa-play/tsconfig.base.json; signa-play/apps/app/package.json; signa-play/apps/app/babel.config.js; signa-play/apps/app/metro.config.js; signa-play/apps/app/app/_layout.tsx]
Tests [label: Tests TDD (Jest + ts-jest) - logica pura, status: done, file: signa-play/apps/app/jest.config.js; signa-play/apps/app/tsconfig.jest.json; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/content.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/catalog.test.ts]
Design [label: Design system infantil (mascota / audio / accesibilidad), status: done, file: signa-play/packages/shared/src/theme.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/BigButton.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/components/Mascot.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/components/ScreenContainer.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/hooks/useSpeak.ts]
Contenido [shape: cylinder, label: Modelo de contenido (curriculo L1 + 5 params LSM), status: done, file: signa-play/packages/shared/src/content.ts; signa-play/packages/shared/src/data/lessons.ts; signa-play/packages/shared/src/data/l5_animales.ts; signa-play/packages/shared/src/library.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/content.test.ts]
Formato [shape: cylinder, label: Formato 3D de senas - USD (lsm_pn ya exporta) a glTF runtime, status: done, file: lsm_pn/usd/writer.py]
Pipeline [shape: cylinder, label: Pipeline sintetico senas 3D (lsm_pn a glTF + fallback skeleton), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/tools/generate_signs.py; signa-play/tools/_lsm.py; signa-play/tools/backends/skeleton.py; signa-play/tools/backends/avatar.py; signa-play/tools/blender_usd_to_gltf.py; signa-play/apps/app/lib/signAssets.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/signAssets.test.ts]
Video [label: Video del signer real (grabacion en camara), status: wip, labels: feature]
FlowStudio [shape: cylinder, label: Flow Studio - mocap markerless del video a USD avatar animado, status: wip, labels: feature, file: lsm_pn/usd/reader.py; scripts/maya_scene_io.py]
Transcripcion [label: Transcripcion notacion L5 faltante (5 senas al corpus), status: done, labels: feature, file: lsm_pn/../docs/signs_extra.json; lsm_pn/signs.py, tests: lsm/tests/test_signs_extra.py]
CorrectorMaya [shape: cylinder, label: Auto-corrector Maya guiado por notacion (anti-overlap: penetracion / contacto / CM), status: todo, labels: feature, file: lsm_pn/calibrate/compare.py; scripts/maya_scene_io.py]
MocapGlb [shape: cylinder, label: USD mocap a glTF/GLB (Blender, reusa el converter), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/tools/flow_to_glb.py; signa-play/tools/glb_audit.py; signa-play/tools/blender_usd_to_gltf.py, tests: signa-play/tools/tests/test_flow_to_glb.py]
Catalogo [label: Catalogo y navegacion de lecciones, status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/app/index.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/app/leccion/[id].tsx; signa-play/apps/app/lib/catalog.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/LessonCard.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/components/SignCard.tsx, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/catalog.test.ts]
Player [label: Reproductor de sena 3D (visor mocap: encuadre robusto + raiz anclada), status: wip, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/app/sena/[id].tsx; signa-play/apps/app/lib/player/view.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/player/framing.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/player/anim.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/SignModel3D.web.tsx, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/player.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/framing.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/anim.test.ts]
Alcance [label: ALCANCE MVP - adjunta features aca, color: #ffffff, status: todo, textColor: #000000]
Abecedario [label: Abecedario (dactilologia, 10 letras con 3D + camara), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/packages/shared/src/data/abecedario.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/glbAssets.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/abecedario.test.ts]
Vocabulario [label: Vocabulario basico (numeros / colores / animales), status: todo, labels: feature]
Juegos [label: Mini-juegos / quiz (Toca Lexsi 2-AFC/3-AFC, pantalla jugable), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/activities/quiz.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/activities/quizRound.ts; signa-play/apps/app/app/quiz.tsx, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/activities.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/quizRound.test.ts]
Recognize [shape: cylinder, label: Servicio recognize (FastAPI sobre lsm_pn), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/recognize-api/recognize_api/main.py; signa-play/apps/recognize-api/recognize_api/service.py; signa-play/apps/recognize-api/recognize_api/lsm_bridge.py; signa-play/apps/app/lib/recognize/api.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/recognize-api/tests/test_service.py; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/recognizeApi.test.ts]
Camara [label: Captura de camara (web getUserMedia, fondo removido por segmentacion), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/app/practica.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/components/PracticaCamera.web.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/awaitReadyVideo.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/segmenter.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/pacing.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/maskBlend.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/handMask.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/awaitReadyVideo.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/pacing.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/maskBlend.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/handMask.test.ts]
Landmarks [label: Extraccion landmarks MediaPipe (cliente), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/extractor.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/extractor.native.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/types.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/vision.test.ts]
Match [label: Match + feedback al nino (correcto / reintenta), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/match/score.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/match.test.ts]
Practica [label: Actividad Sena Lexsi (countdown + camara + indicador de manos), status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/practice/session.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/practice/navigation.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/handIndicator.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/HandLights.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/app/practica.tsx, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/practice.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/practiceNavigation.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/handIndicator.test.ts]
Progreso [shape: cylinder, label: Persistencia de progreso (AsyncStorage + estrellas en UI), status: done, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/progress/model.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/progress/store.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/progress/persist.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/SignCard.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/components/LessonCard.tsx, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/progress.test.ts; signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/progressStore.test.ts]
Gamificacion [label: Niveles / estrellas / racha, status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/lib/progress/gamification.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/gamification.test.ts]
Onboarding [label: Onboarding + control parental, status: done, labels: feature, file: signa-play/apps/app/app/onboarding.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/app/padres.tsx; signa-play/apps/app/lib/onboarding/state.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/onboarding/parentalGate.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/onboarding/persist.ts, tests: signa-play/apps/app/__tests__/onboarding.test.ts]
QA [label: QA con ninos + accesibilidad, status: todo]
Deploy [label: Deploy v1 en AWS - WEB primero (iOS despues), color: #fff7ed, status: todo]
AwsWeb [shape: cylinder, label: Web estatica - expo export VERIFICADO (dist 55MB, rutas limpias necesitan rewrite en CloudFront); falta cuenta AWS para S3+CloudFront+dominio, status: wip, labels: aws]
AwsApi [shape: cylinder, label: recognize-api - Docker con lsm_pn adentro a ECR; Lambda container + Function URL (barato, cold start ~2s tapado por Lexsi esta mirando); plan B App Runner si molesta; CORS solo al dominio, status: todo, labels: aws]
AwsAssets [shape: cylinder, label: Self-host de assets - HECHO en public/vendor (MediaPipe bundle+wasm+modelos, three-gltf.mjs propio; cero requests a terceros VERIFICADO; a S3 va tal cual), status: done, labels: aws, file: signa-play/apps/app/public/vendor; signa-play/apps/app/scripts/three-entry.js; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/extractor.ts; signa-play/apps/app/lib/vision/segmenter.ts; signa-play/apps/app/components/SignModel3D.web.tsx]
AwsCicd [label: CI/CD GitHub Actions - ci.yml ACTIVO (tsc+jest por push); deploy-web.yml listo via OIDC, inactivo hasta vars/secrets de AWS, status: wip, labels: aws, file: signa-play/.github/workflows/ci.yml; signa-play/.github/workflows/deploy-web.yml]
AwsObs [label: Observabilidad - CloudWatch logs del api + alarma de errores; SIN analytics del nino (privacidad), status: todo, labels: aws]
AwsSync [label: FUTURO opcional - cuentas y sync multi-dispositivo (Cognito + DynamoDB); hoy el progreso es local (AsyncStorage) y para iOS se reusa, status: todo, labels: aws]
Ios [label: App iOS (EAS build + App Store kids category; MediaPipe nativo + handedness) - DESPUES del web, status: todo, labels: feature]
Listo [shape: circle, label: Signa Play v1 listo (web; iOS despues), color: #dcfce7, status: todo]

Grabacion [shape: upload, label: Grabacion de senas (1 video por sena), items: L5 PERRO; L5 GATO; L5 PEZ; L5 PAJARO; L5 TORTUGA (2 manos); L5 CONEJO (2 manos); L5 RATON; L5 MARIPOSA (2 manos); L1 HOLA; L1 ADIOS; L1 GRACIAS; L1 POR FAVOR; L1 BUENOS DIAS; L1 BUENAS TARDES; L1 BUENAS NOCHES; L1 PERDON; L2 NOMBRE; L2 SENA; L2 SORDO; L2 SORDA; L2 PERSONA; L2 LENGUA DE SENAS; L3 MAMA; L3 PAPA; L3 HERMANO; L3 HERMANA; L3 HIJO; L3 HIJA; L3 BEBE; L3 FAMILIA; L4 ABUELO; L4 ABUELA; L4 TIO; L4 TIA; L4 PRIMO; L4 PRIMA; L6 VACA; L6 CABALLO; L6 POLLO; L6 PATO; L6 CERDO; L6 OVEJA; L7 FELIZ; L7 TRISTE; L7 ENOJADO; L7 ALEGRE; L7 MIEDO; L7 SORPRESA; L7 ABURRIDO; L7 CONTENTO; L8 ROJO; L8 AZUL; L8 VERDE; L8 AMARILLO; L8 BLANCO; L8 NEGRO; L8 ROSA; L8 NARANJA; L9 PAN; L9 LECHE; L9 AGUA; L9 GALLETA; L9 MANZANA; L9 HUEVO; L9 FRUTA; L9 JUGO; L10 ESCUELA; L10 MAESTRO; L10 ALUMNO; L10 LIBRO; L10 LAPIZ; L10 MOCHILA; L10 CLASE; L10 ESTUDIAR; L11 MANO; L11 CABEZA; L11 OJO; L11 NARIZ; L11 BOCA; L11 PIE; L11 CABELLO; L11 CARA; L12 MANANA; L12 NOCHE; L12 DORMIR; L12 COMER; L12 BANAR; L12 JUGAR; L12 DESPERTAR; L12 LUNA, buzon: , status: todo]
Evidencia [shape: upload, label: Subir avances (avatar / diseno / docs), items: Avatar Flow Studio riggeado en USD (o el GLB ya convertido); Claude design - mockups del Reproductor y las actividades; Doc - variante elegida por sena (Content Bible vs videos)]
